examples: LOL has evolved into something much subtler and sophisticated and is used even when nothing is remotely amusing.
However, most young netizens consider this emoji as "Laugh to tears" or simply "LOL", which means "Laugh out loud".
The OED defines LOL as an interjection "used chiefly in electronic communications… to draw attention to a joke or humorous statement, or to express amusement".
Uh, are you going to claim the criminals and civilians are superior shots, LOL?
So, an "LOLOL" is worth more than an "LOL, " and the more exclamation points, the better.
